name: bazarr
description: Subtitle manager for movies and TV series

fields.name: BAZARR_PORT
fields.label: App Port
fields.help: Port used to open Bazarr in your browser.

fields.name: BAZARR_CONFIG_LOCATION
fields.label: Bazarr Config Folder
fields.help: Stores Bazarr configuration, database, and application state.

fields.name: TV_LOCATION
fields.label: TV Library Folder
fields.help: Folder where your TV library is stored for subtitle matching and downloads.

fields.name: MOVIES_LOCATION
fields.label: Movies Library Folder
fields.help: Folder where your movies library is stored for subtitle matching and downloads.

fields.name: PUID
fields.label: PUID
fields.help: User ID used by the container for file permissions.

fields.name: PGID
fields.label: PGID
fields.help: Group ID used by the container for file permissions.

fields.name: TZ
fields.label: Timezone
fields.help:
Timezone used by Bazarr for scheduled tasks and logs.
Example: Asia/Dubai.

fields.name: RESTART_POLICY
fields.label: Restart Policy
fields.help: Controls whether the container restarts automatically.

fields.name: BAZARR_NETWORK_MODE
fields.label: Network
fields.help: Choose Create New Bridge for the default Compose network, Host Mode for host networking, or an existing named Docker network.

fields.name: BAZARR_IMAGE
fields.label: Image
fields.help:
Docker image used for Bazarr.
Change this only if you want a different tag or image source.

fields.name: BAZARR_CONTAINER_NAME
fields.label: Container Name
fields.help: EasyDocker sets the container name from the project name.

ui.overview: Bazarr helps you download and manage subtitles for both TV series and movies.
what_happens: A Bazarr container will be created
Your config, TV library, and movies library folders will be mounted into the container
You can keep the default bridge network or attach Bazarr to an existing network
ui.data_location: Relative paths are stored inside this app's project folder under the mounted EasyDocker base config path.
